params_used.custom_text: // This module implements a 32-entry register file supporting read and write operations. It uses a 5-bit address bus for both read and write operations, a 5-bit write address bus, and a 32-bit data bus for writing. The module operates on the falling edge of a clock signal and includes an active-high reset feature that sets all registers to zero when activated. When Regwr is low or Rw is zero, no writes occur.
